Banners — hybrid split per platform

Heritage illustration on the institutional platforms (Facebook, LinkedIn, Google Business Profile). Photo banner using P43 (Forest US brick storefront — Simon Hermans) on the consumer / content-discovery platforms (YouTube, X, Pinterest, TikTok).

Bio drafts (three lengths)

All three tiers against your v2 voice rules. Sign off, edit in place at design_system/ryan-realty/assets/social/bio-drafts.md, or tell me what to change.

# Ryan Realty — bio system (v2)

Built from three inputs:
1. **Your current Instagram bio** (pulled live via Meta Graph API on 2026-05-13)
2. **Your mission statement** (your directive): *building community through authentic relationships and exceptional customer service*
3. **2026 best-practice research** on real-estate brand bios — mission-first framing, scannable structure, specific not generic, clear CTA, under-150-char on consumer platforms

## Your current bios (for reference)

**Instagram** (`@ryanrealtybend`):
> Your trusted Central Oregon brokerage. 🤝
> Committed to building community through authentic relationships and exceptional customer service. 🏡🌲

**Facebook Page** (`Ryan Realty Bend`):
> We are your trusted Central Oregon Real Estate brokerage. 🤝
> We strive to build long lasting authentic relationships with our clients by providing exceptional customer service and being professionals in our field. How can we earn your business?

What's working: positioning ("trusted Central Oregon brokerage"), mission front-and-center, the "how can we earn your business?" close on Facebook. What can sharpen: emoji policy (your v2 brand rules ban them, but they soften the read — flagging for your call), tighter line length on consumer platforms, consistent mission line everywhere.

---

## The mission line — appears verbatim on every channel

```
Building community through authentic relationships and exceptional customer service.
```
85 characters. This is the universal anchor. Don't paraphrase. Don't shorten. Same words everywhere — that's what makes a mission statement do its job.

---

## Display name — every platform

| Platform | Paste exactly |
|---|---|
| Instagram | `Ryan Realty · Bend, Oregon` (26) |
| Facebook Page | `Ryan Realty Bend` (16) — matches current |
| LinkedIn | `Ryan Realty` (11) |
| YouTube | `Ryan Realty · Bend, Oregon` (26) |
| X / Twitter | `Ryan Realty · Bend, OR` (22) |
| TikTok | `Ryan Realty` (11) |
| Pinterest | `Ryan Realty · Bend, Oregon` (26) |
| Threads | (inherits from IG) |
| GBP | `Ryan Realty` (matches LLC) |

---

## Short bio — Instagram · X · TikTok · Pinterest · Threads (under 150 chars)

### Version 1 — strict v2 brand voice (no emoji, no exclamation)

```
Your trusted Central Oregon brokerage.
Building community through authentic relationships and exceptional customer service.
541.213.6706 · ryan-realty.com
```
*153 chars including line breaks. Trim the contact line if a platform's bio is 150-char-max — the phone and website also live in the dedicated fields.*

### Version 2 — preserves your current emoji voice

```
Your trusted Central Oregon brokerage. 🤝
Building community through authentic relationships and exceptional customer service. 🏡🌲
541.213.6706 · ryan-realty.com
```
*Slightly over 150 chars — trim the contact line for IG/X (those have separate phone/website fields).*

### Version 3 — punchier, mission-first

```
Building community through authentic relationships and exceptional customer service.
Your trusted Central Oregon brokerage.
541.213.6706 · ryan-realty.com
```
*Same content as Version 1 but leads with the WHY — research-backed structure (Simon Sinek "start with why"). Same character count.*

> **Pick one** — V1, V2, or V3. I'd go V3 (mission-first) without emoji for the new v2 brand consistency. Open to V2 if you'd rather keep the current voice intact.

---

## Medium bio — LinkedIn Company intro · YouTube About · GBP intro (≤500 chars)

```
Ryan Realty is your trusted Central Oregon real estate brokerage.

Our mission is to build community through authentic relationships and exceptional customer service. Every conversation, every transaction, every long-term plan starts with the same question: how can we earn your business?

Bend · Tumalo · Sunriver · Sisters · Redmond
541.213.6706 · ryan-realty.com
```
*418 chars. Fits LinkedIn About intro, YouTube channel description, GBP business description.*

---

## Full About — LinkedIn Company · GBP description · website footer (≤2000 chars)

```
Ryan Realty is your trusted Central Oregon real estate brokerage, based in downtown Bend.

Our mission is to build community through authentic relationships and exceptional customer service. We work with the people who already live in Central Oregon and the ones who are moving here, on every kind of move — first homes, forever homes, retirement plans, investment property, land, complex builds.

How we work:

Honest. We tell you what we'd tell a friend, even when the answer isn't what you wanted to hear.

Direct. We don't hedge, pad, or talk in real-estate clichés. You get clear answers, fast.

Kind. Every client and every counterparty gets treated with respect — that's how trust gets built.

Local. We live here. We know the neighborhoods, the trails, the breweries, the school districts, and the trades.

Whether you're buying your first home in Bend, listing in Tumalo, retiring to Sunriver, building in Sisters, or thinking through an investment strategy, we work with you the way you'd want us to.

How can we earn your business?

Ryan Realty · Bend, Oregon
115 NW Oregon Ave Suite #2 · Bend, OR 97703
541.213.6706 · matt@ryan-realty.com · ryan-realty.com
```
*~1,200 chars. Fits LinkedIn Company About (2000), GBP business description (750 max — will need to trim by ~450 chars for GBP), and website footer.*

### GBP-specific (≤750 chars) — trimmed version of Full About

```
Ryan Realty is your trusted Central Oregon real estate brokerage, based in downtown Bend.

Our mission: build community through authentic relationships and exceptional customer service.

We work the way you'd want us to. Honest. Direct. Kind. Local. We know the neighborhoods, the trails, the breweries, the school districts.

Buying your first home in Bend, listing in Tumalo, retiring to Sunriver, building in Sisters, or thinking through an investment strategy — we'll help you do it right.

How can we earn your business?

541.213.6706 · matt@ryan-realty.com · ryan-realty.com
```
*~620 chars.*

### Facebook Page About — current is 255-char max

```
Your trusted Central Oregon real estate brokerage. Building community through authentic relationships and exceptional customer service.

How can we earn your business?
541.213.6706 · ryan-realty.com
```
*~210 chars.*

---

## Open decisions before I lock this in

1. **Emoji policy.** Your v2 brand rules ban emoji. Your current IG bio uses 🤝🏡🌲. Pick:
   - **(a) Strict v2** — no emoji anywhere (matches the rest of the brand system).
   - **(b) Preserve current voice** — keep emoji on IG / TikTok / Threads (consumer platforms), strip on LinkedIn / GBP (institutional).
   - **(c) Full preservation** — emoji on every platform that supports them.
2. **Short bio version** — V1, V2, or V3 above.
3. **Tagline behind a CTA** — your current FB has *"How can we earn your business?"* as a closer. Want that on the consumer bios too (would push the short bio to 180 chars — drop the phone line to fit), or reserve it for the longer About-style bios?
4. **Hashtag in IG bio?** — `#bendoregon`, `#centraloregon`, `#bendrealestate`? Most realtors don't use them in bio (they go in posts) but some do. Default: no hashtags in bio.
5. **Service-area shoutouts** — currently I list Bend · Tumalo · Sunriver · Sisters · Redmond in the medium/long versions. Add La Pine? Prineville? Madras? Powell Butte? Tell me your coverage map and I'll align.
What I'm waiting on from you:
1. Photo numbers from the contact sheet (e.g. "P3, P12, P47")
2. Sign-off (or edits) on the bio drafts above
3. Confirm the banner split: heritage illustration on GBP/LinkedIn/FB, photo variant on YouTube/X/Pinterest/TikTok
